---
title: Guides
subtitle: Practical paths from your data to a BDM dataset
toc: false
listing:
  template: ../assets/templates/simple-links-listing.ejs
  sort: "order"
  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents: ["*.qmd"]
---

**New to BDM? [Start here](1-getting-started.qmd).** It takes you from a
typical dataset to a first BDM-structured one — you do not need to understand
all of BDM before you begin.

The other guides each solve one concrete problem. Iterate: apply an idea to
your data, come back when you need the next one.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Missing a guide?** Several are planned — see the [roadmap](/why/roadmap.qmd)
— and [your vote](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model/issues/new) moves
them up the queue.
:::
